name: ep_to_upper
description: Convert a string to uppercase (ASCII letters only). Source: EnergyPlus/UtilityRoutines.cc ConvertCaseToUpper() — original uses a custom character table; adapted here to std::toupper.
python_reference:
def ep_to_upper(s: str) -> str:
    return s.upper()
mojo_reference:
fn ep_to_upper(s: String) -> String:
    return s.upper()
